macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US February Jobs Report Shows 92,000 Payroll Losses and Unemployment at 4.4%
items.summary: The February jobs report revealed a sharper-than-expected decline of 92,000 payrolls with unemployment rising to 4.4%, signaling weaker economic growth amid ongoing market pressures.

items.title: Oil Prices Surge Due to Iran War Disrupting Strait of Hormuz Supplies
items.summary: Geopolitical tensions from the Iran war have caused oil prices to spike sharply, creating an inflation shock that offsets potential Fed easing expectations from weak jobs data.

items.title: Stocks Under Pressure from Weak Jobs and Rising Energy Costs
items.summary: Major stock indices face downside risks and elevated volatility due to combined weaker economic momentum, surging oil prices, and higher interest rates amid inflation fears.

items.title: Markets Cautious on S&P 500 Amid Inflation Spike and Weak Jobs
items.summary: The S&P 500 hovers at the low end of its multi-month range with neutral-to-bearish fundamentals driven by rising inflation projections up to 2.9% from elevated oil prices.

items.title: Markets Can Handle Temporary Oil Spike But Not Prolonged Rise
items.summary: Experts note that while markets may absorb a short-term oil price surge from global tensions, a sustained increase could pressure equities significantly.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Rep. Al Green Accuses Trump Family of $1B Crypto Scam
items.summary: Representative Al Green alleges President Trump and his family orchestrated a large-scale pump and dump scheme involving Trump-branded meme coins ($TRUMP and $MELANIA), which rocketed from pennies to over $13 before crashing to cents, with the Trump family reportedly pocketing over $1 billion in pretax profits while retail investors lost 90-99% of their value.

items.title: Trump Administration Criticizes Banks for Stalling Crypto CLARITY Act
items.summary: President Trump slammed banks for obstructing the CLARITY Act, a landmark cryptocurrency regulation bill that has hit a new impasse in Congress.

items.title: Bitcoin Price Analysis: Key Support and Resistance Levels Identified
items.summary: Technical analysis shows Bitcoin trading between 65.5K-66K support with strong resistance at 69K-69.5K, while Ethereum and Solana face overbought signals suggesting potential short-term pullbacks.

items.title: Solana Elliott Wave Analysis Points to Potential $360 Target
items.summary: Cryptocurrency analysts using Elliott Wave Theory suggest Solana may be positioned for a major rally, with analysis exploring whether the next leg toward $360 is already underway or if another pullback is expected first.

items.title: Arthur Hayes on US-Iran Conflict Impact on Bitcoin and Markets
items.summary: Cointelegraph interview with crypto analyst Arthur Hayes discusses how geopolitical tensions and potential war spending could affect Bitcoin's outlook, with analysis of why Bitcoin has held up during the crisis.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: OpenAI Announces GPT 5.4 and GPT 5.4 Pro with Major Productivity Gains
items.summary: OpenAI launched GPT 5.4 and GPT 5.4 Pro, achieving 87.3% on spreadsheet modeling benchmarks, up from 68.4% for GPT 5.2, alongside a ChatGPT for Excel beta add-in boosting financial modeling accuracy to 87.3%. The models feature a 4 million token context for enterprise productivity.
items.source: Let's Data Science — AI News Daily (YouTube)

items.title: OpenAI Secures $110 Billion Funding Round Valuing Company at $730 Billion
items.summary: OpenAI raised $110 billion in funding, with Amazon investing $50 billion and gaining exclusivity, signaling massive capital influx into AI amid structured finance expansions.
items.source: Let's Data Science — AI News Daily (YouTube)

items.title: MWC 2026 Proves AI-Native Networks Are Infrastructure Reality
items.summary: MWC 2026 featured live field trials, a 12-operator 6G coalition, and commercial hardware, confirming AI-native networks as a current reality beyond future promises.

items.title: AI Cited in 4,680 US Job Cuts in February 2026, But Analysts Downplay Overall Impact
items.summary: US shed 92,000 jobs in February amid 4.4% unemployment; AI was reason for 10% of cuts that month and 8% year-to-date, though analysts attribute broader trends to other factors like strikes.

items.title: Machine Learning Predicts Bitcoin Price Recovery to $74,671 by March 31
items.summary: A ML algorithm using ChatGPT, Grok, and Gemini forecasts Bitcoin rebounding 6.82% to $74,671 despite recent 5% drop below $67,000 due to outflows and tensions.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Microsoft Announces Next-Gen Console Project Helix
items.summary: Microsoft officially revealed Project Helix, promising the largest technical jump in console history with a flexible ecosystem for native PC and Xbox games. The announcement highlights advanced features for cross-platform play.

items.title: Ubisoft Confirms Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag Remake - Black Flag Resynced
items.summary: Ubisoft announced development of Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag remake titled Black Flag Resynced, alongside a 60 FPS update for Assassin's Creed Unity on current-gen consoles.

items.title: Multiple New Game Reveals Including Monster Hunter Stories 3 and Mixtape
items.summary: March 2026 reveals feature Monster Hunter Stories 3 releasing March 13 on PS5, Xbox, and PC; Mixtape on May 7 for PS5, Xbox, Switch 2, and PC; plus titles like Onimusha Way of the Sword and Phantom Lamb for 2026.

items.title: Resident Evil Requiem Tops Early 2026 Releases with 89 Metacritic Score
items.summary: Capcom's Resident Evil Requiem earns critical acclaim for blending horror and action, praised for atmosphere and RE Engine visuals, marking a strong start to 2026 releases.

items.title: Nintendo Sues for Refunds on Trump Tariffs Impacting Switch 2
items.summary: Nintendo filed a lawsuit seeking refunds with interest on tariffs paid under Trump, which led to pausing Switch 2 pre-orders; the tariffs affected imports from Asia and were recently invalidated.

items.title: Slay the Spire 2 Tops Steam Sales, No Microtransactions Promised
items.summary: Slay the Spire 2 surpassed Marathon as Steam's top-selling title, with developers confirming no microtransactions in the game.

items.title: Crimson Desert Marketing Director Addresses Console Performance Concerns
items.summary: Pearl Abyss' marketing director responded to accusations of withholding console footage for Crimson Desert, promising transparency while criticizing demands for info as entitlement.

items.title: Resident Evil Requiem Faces Heavy Censorship Criticism in Japan
items.summary: Resident Evil Requiem (RE9) has disappointed Japanese fans due to heavy censorship, amid its overall critical success.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Canada and Japan Sign Strategic Partnership on Semiconductors and Advanced Technology
items.summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney announced a comprehensive strategic partnership with Japan's Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi, strengthening cooperation in semiconductors, critical minerals, liquefied natural gas, and emerging clean energy technologies.

items.title: Europe Enters Era of Mega-Constellations with Amazon Leo Satellites
items.summary: Europe is advancing its satellite infrastructure capabilities with the Ariane 64 rocket supporting Amazon's Leo mega-constellation deployment.

items.title: Honor Launches 'Robot Phone' with AI Integration
items.summary: Honor introduced a new smartphone device designed to function as an AI companion with interactive features.

items.title: New Wearable Device Allows Pets to Call Owners
items.summary: A new wearable technology enables pets to contact their owners when they need attention.
